comparison_scope: two immutable revisions with the same model_id
compatible_changes: add an optional property, point, or capability under a new key
add a description or legacy alias
strengthen capability governance without granting new authority
breaking_changes: remove or reuse an existing key
change a value_type, point kind, authority, or unit semantics
weaken confirmation, expiry, idempotency, audit, or edge-final-decision requirements
change a capability from governed-job execution
semantic_checks_not_expressible_by_json_: keys are unique within and across the property, point, and capability namespaces
parameter keys are unique within each capability
legacy aliases are not mapped to conflicting definitions
a revision number never identifies different canonical bytes
